title: This NEW NotebookLM Update Changes Everything
summary: Google's NotebookLM has been upgraded to function as a full AI agent capable of writing code, building sources, and delivering finished outputs autonomously. New features include a cloud computer for handling code and documents, auto-source building from initial ideas, and a Studio for generating podcasts and reports with cited answers.
writeup: The video covers a NotebookLM update that reframes the tool as a full AI agent: it can write code, build sources, and produce finished outputs on its own rather than only answering questions about uploaded material. The concrete additions include a cloud computer for handling code and documents, auto-source building that expands an initial idea into a source set, and a Studio that generates podcasts and reports with cited answers. The shift matters because it moves NotebookLM from a research assistant toward autonomous, end-to-end output generation.
